title: Perugia, Umbria — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Perugia, Umbria: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Perugia is a city in Umbria with a population of 163,000. A hilltop Umbrian city famous for its medieval architecture, chocolate festival, and as the gateway to the green heart of Italy.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
